title: selenicereus guatemalensis
intro: Selenicereus guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan night-blooming cereus, is a species of cactus native to Central America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being, with potential benefits including improved digestion and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
